name: BooleanConverter
summary: The BooleanConverter class converts types to and from the boolean type.

constructors.name: BooleanConverter
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BooleanConverter class

methods.name: CanConvertFrom
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the source type to the boolean type.

methods.name: CanConvertTo
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the boolean type to the destination type.

methods.name: ConvertFrom
methods.summary: Converts an object from the given culture to the boolean type.

methods.name: ConvertTo
methods.summary: Converts an object from the boolean type to the given destination type.
